entries.label: mac-app-code
entries.note: Claude MAC APP Code page (Claude Code desktop), sidebar expanded: New session/Artifacts/Customize/More nav, sessions grouped by repo with numbered chips. Main: session header w/ laptop icon + title + repo chip, toolbar icons right; transcript: grey tool-line rows w/ chevrons, right-aligned user bubbles, assistant prose, purple PR chip row, branch bar + Create PR, composer w/ Bypass permissions chip, footer 'Fable 5 High'. Private - pixels stay local.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.

entries.label: mac-app-code-split
entries.note: Code page in SPLIT-PANE layout, sidebar collapsed: two side-by-side session panes each w/ own header, transcript, branch bar, composer, model footer. Real retina pixels - use for exact chrome colors/typography metrics. Private - stays local.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.

entries.label: mac-app-home
entries.note: Claude MAC APP Home page. Sidebar: traffic lights, Home|Code segmented toggle, New/Projects/Artifacts/Scheduled/Dispatch(Beta)/Customize nav, Recents list, Design item, footer account row. Main: serif 'Good evening, <name>' greeting w/ orange asterisk mark, composer card 'How can I help you today?' with + button, Chat|Cowork PILL TOGGLE (chat+cowork are now ONE page), model chip 'Sonnet 4.6 Medium', mic; below-composer row: 'Project or folder' + 'Manual' dropdowns, usage note; 'Ideas for you' list w/ 3 icon rows. Private (owner name visible) - pixels stay local.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.

entries.label: web-app-composer-dark-official
entries.source: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/8887527-customizing-your-appearance-settings (Anthropic's own Claude Help Center, 'Color mode' illustration, Light/Match system/Dark side-by-side)
entries.note: Re-acquisition of the 2026-07-09 web-app-composer-dark-official entry: that manifest declared this file but the image was never actually saved to disk (health-check gap). Official vendor help-center illustration of the composer component in Light vs Dark color mode (Settings > Appearance > Color mode); confirms near-black card background (dark card lighter than page, ~rgb(45,45,43)-ish), hairline borders, unchanged orange send button across themes, and 'Choose style'/model-selector pill styling. Not a full-page capture of web-app-chat or web-app-home (no sidebar/thread) -- small illustrative crop, staged for the help doc, model label reads an older 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet' so treat model-selector text as directional only. See web-app-home-dark (2026-07-13) in this family for a real full-page live-web dark capture that supersedes this for chrome/layout grounding.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.

entries.label: web-app-home-dark
entries.source: https://claude.ai/new (owner's logged-in Chrome session via claude-in-chrome MCP)
entries.note: Live-web full-page dark-mode capture of claude.ai/new (web-app-home), viewport 1450x767 @2x. Theme switched to Dark via Settings > Appearance in the owner's own session, then beacon+crop procedure isolated page content from browser chrome (docs/fidelity-loop-plan-2026-07-05.md). Sidebar shows the owner's real recent-chat titles (private) -- screenshot.png stays local/gitignored per house rule; tokens.json was extracted with {slim:true} (no page text) so it is safe to commit. Fills the 'not captured in any dated set' dark-theme gap for web-app-home.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.
